narrative:
Precinct Saltcreek (precinct in Hocking County) has 649 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.8 percentage points.
